title: Kaze no Stigma
sourceNotes: 24-episode anime adapts all 6 main light novel volumes (39 chapters + epilogues total; author Takahiro Yamato died in 2009, leaving the 6 side-story 'Ignition' compilations as a separate, unadapted spin-off). Episodic structure runs ~4 episodes per volume, so arc boundaries are approximated at one volume per arc using the official volume subtitles; precise chapter-level guides were not available.
